items.title: Drone jammed near French aircraft carrier was probably Russian, says Sweden
items.dek: Sweden's defence minister says there is likely a "strong link" between the drone and a Russian naval vessel in the area.
items.body: Sweden's defence minister says there is likely a "strong link" between the drone and a Russian naval vessel in the area.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'They seized everything': Yemen's Houthi rebels drive aid groups to the brink
items.dek: Aid groups - a lifeline for millions of Yemenis - are being squeezed out of existence in areas under the control of the rebels, the BBC hears.
items.body: Aid groups - a lifeline for millions of Yemenis - are being squeezed out of existence in areas under the control of the rebels, the BBC hears.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: The AI videos supercharging Russia's online disinformation campaigns
items.dek: Security experts have warned that Western governments are poorly equipped to counter a new frontier of online disinformation.
items.body: Security experts have warned that Western governments are poorly equipped to counter a new frontier of online disinformation.
items.author: IriLine Desk
